creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
Comment on attachment 229307
Patch to update the port to 2.1.8 and fix an issue in probing for gv

It was not correct to mark attachment 229307 as obsolete.

My fix involves two patches, attachment 229307 and 229308, both of which must be applied.

Attachment 229307 updates the port to 2.1.8.

Attachment 229308 fixes the dependencies so the port will build even if autotools are not yet installed.
